role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation density, and forest types.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific tree species (Pinus strobus) and undergrowth.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road width, shoulders, and utility pole infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Assessed image quality (Google Street View generation) and cross-domain consistency.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United States. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing high-quality, image-grounded evidence (e.g., specific pine species, utility pole styles) that effectively ruled out European and Asian candidates. The final decision was well-supported by the consensus of the specialists.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of mixed forest and hilly terrain match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of pine and hardwood mix are consistent with the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the narrow road and wooden poles are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Assessment of image quality and infrastructure style is consistent.
